---
title: "Mis Proyectos"
listing:
  - id: datos
    contents: lectures/datos
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px

  - id: ml
    contents: lectures/machine-learning
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px

  - id: viz
    contents: lectures/visualizacion
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    image-height: 200px
---

## 📊 Análisis de Datos

:::{#datos}
:::

## 🤖 Machine Learning

:::{#ml}
:::

## 📈 Visualización

:::{#viz}
:::
